occupation: Chief Executive Officer at Outdoor Media Association

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description: 🚏 In my role as CEO, I’ve championed several high-impact, cross-industry projects designed to amplify the Out of Home channel’s value and societal contribution. Most notably, a Deloitte Access Economics study in 2024 was commissioned that quantified Out-of-Home’s direct contribution to the Australian economy—$1.3 billion annually—and the management of over 21,500 public infrastructure assets valued at more than $650 million. 🚊This research underpins our case in government and regulatory forums, reinforcing Out of Home’s role as a vital funder of public amenities and services. 🌱 In 2024 the OMA Creative Awards Lunch were established, a premier industry program recognizing excellence in outdoor and out of home campaign innovation and creativity—bringing together Executive Creative Directors and Chief Marketing Officers to celebrate standout creativity in out of home  and foster professional collaboration. 🥦 Under my leadership, OMA has scaled its Healthy Eating Campaigns into a sustained national movement. The 2025 iteration, “Fresh veg, deliciously affordable”, developed with Health and Wellbeing Queensland and AUSVEG, delivered $10.6million in donated media value and reached over 9.8million Australians. 🌽 A post-campaign survey found impressive behavioural outcomes: 92% of parents were encouraged to include vegetables in meals, and 80% reported motivation to make healthier dietary choices. 💪 This initiative demonstrates the power of public–private collaboration in achieving measurable public health impact.

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description: MOVE2 an updated audience measurement platform that delivers the most advanced understanding of how audiences interact with out of home. MOVE builds on its predecessor with data insights that will capture hourly data across more than 100,000 digital and classic OOH locations nationwide. This will redefine how advertisers measure reach and effectiveness across urban, regional, and place-based environments—365 days a year.

education.degree_name: Leading and Building a Culture of Innovation

education.field_of_study: Business, Management, Marketing, and Related Support Services
